title: Student — My Grades
content:
Overview


The My Grades page displays the student's grades across all enrolled subjects, organized by term and year. Teacher comments are also visible here.



Viewing Grades


Before grades are shown, the student selects:


  • Term: Fall Semester, Spring Semester, Winter Semester, September Term, January Term, or May Term
  • Year: Use the plus/minus buttons to change the academic year

Once a term and year are selected, a table displays:


  • Subject: Each subject the student is enrolled in for that term
  • Grades: Scores for classwork, midterms, finals, and assignments as entered by the teacher
  • Teacher comments: A comment icon appears next to subjects where the teacher has left feedback


Viewing Teacher Comments


  1. Click the comment icon next to a subject or grade
  2. A modal opens showing the subject name, teacher name, and the full comment text
  3. Click Close to dismiss

Comments are written by teachers through their Gradebook and can include feedback on performance, areas for improvement, or general observations.



How Grades Are Entered


Grades are entered by teachers through the Gradebook in the Teacher Portal. Students cannot edit or change their grades. School admins can view grades through the Admin Portal but cannot modify them either.


If a student believes a grade is incorrect, they should contact their teacher directly. Support agents cannot change grades.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "Make sure you've selected the right term and year to see your current grades."
  • "Click the comment icon next to any subject to read your teacher's feedback."
  • "If you think a grade is wrong, contact your teacher — grades can only be changed by them."
  • "If no grades appear, your teacher may not have entered them yet for that term."
